content.full_text:
October 5, 1992

Attn: Carla Wardlow
Fair Political Practices Commission
Technical Assistance and Analysis Division
428 J Street
Sacramento, CA 95814

Dear Ms. Wardlow,

I am sending you a copy of our campaign statement. We have complied with your suggestions regarding the benefit concerts we talked about previously. Our statement reflects our best attempt to comply with your instructions.

Because this concert fund raising effort proved to be such an enormously complicated reporting task, we would like a formal ruling on how to conduct such an event in the future.

Also because of the complexity, we have asked a lawyer to review the whole picture and give an opinion regarding it. His statement is attached.

Thanks very much for your help.

Sincerely,

[signature]

Susan Bott, Treasurer
Committee to Re-Elect Bill Wallace
P.O. Box 2483
Goleta, CA 93118
